title: No Fog Plz
description: Removes fog that was added in 1.21.6 makes things much clearer!
body:
# __**No Fog**__

## __**Overview**__

Simply removes the fog that was added in minecraft 1.21.6 when it rains and fog in general. As shown in the gallery dramatically increase the viewing during rain 

## __**Support**__

Join the BBL [Discord](https://discord.gg/benbenlaw) for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/benbenlaw) to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
